name: Templeton Global Growth Fund Ltd.
summary: Templeton Global Growth Fund Ltd. is a closed-ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Franklin Templeton Investments Australia Limited. The fund invests in public equity markets across the globe. It seeks to invest in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund primarily invests in value stocks of companies. It employs fundamental analysis with a bottom-up stock picking approach to create its portfolio. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI All Country World Free Index. Templeton Global Growth Fund Ltd. was formed in May 1987 and is domiciled in Australia.
